headline: Is GE Vernova Inc. (GEV) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GEV a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on GE Vernova Inc. on Crack The Market’s Substack by Ozeco. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GEV. GE Vernova Inc.’s share was trading at $985.92 as of April 15th. GEV’s trailing and forward P/E were 55.73 and 67.57 respectively […]

headline: The 1 Energy Stock You Should Be Buying for the $700 Billion AI Spending Spree
summary: The market has a funny way of chasing what’s visible while missing what actually powers it. Everyone is focused on AI chips, software, and trillion-dollar tech giants. But here’s the question investors should be asking: what happens when all that computing power needs electricity — lots of it? Data centers don’t run on code alone. ... The 1 Energy Stock You Should Be Buying for the $700 Billion AI Spending Spree

headline: GE Vernova Gets Another Price Target Hike. Wall Street Is Chasing the Stock.
summary: It’s been an epic week for  GE Vernova  and it’s not over yet.  Friday, Jefferies analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith raised his price target for GE Vernova stock to $1,350 from $965, and kept his Buy rating.  Wall Street earnings estimates are still too low following the company’s first-quarter earnings report, he says.
